<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

<div style="font-size: 2.4rem; text-align: center">
Oh no 😭

This page doesn't exist 😢
</div>

<div style="font-size: 1.5rem; text-align: center">
<br>
Here's a hug to make you feel better.
<br>
<br>
Maybe go back to the <a href="https://sfu26.netlify.app/">main page</a><br>
or use your browser back button?
</div>
